prompts.prompt: Run a backtest of the E1 rate divergence hypothesis at 60-day hold across all 8 forex pairs (EURUSD, GBPUSD, AUDUSD, AUDNZD, NZDUSD, USDCAD, USDJPY, EURGBP). Compare Sharpe ratio and win rate vs. the 20-day hold variant. Output: Sharpe (60d vs 20d), total trades, win%, average R per trade, and monthly drawdown for each hold period. This completes the TESTING hypothesis.
